name: GIGABYTE H610M S2H V2 DDR4 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel H610 Chipset - Support DDR4-3200 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Connector - USB 3.2 Gen1 - HDMI 2.0 - DisplayPort 1.2 - DVI-D - D-Sub - Realtek Gigabit LAN
shortName: GIGABYTE H610M S2H V2 DDR4 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Budget micro-ATX motherboard with LGA 1700 socket, H610 chipset, and DDR4 support for entry builds.
